name: Iron Indoor Outdoor Plant Stand White/Brass - Threshold™
description:
Liven up the decor of any space with this Iron Indoor/Outdoor Planter Stand from Threshold™. The iron planter features a round shape in a lacquered gold finish with a white top for a stunning look. Great for displaying real or faux plants indoors or outdoors, you can place it solo or with other planters.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
